name: DC x MCU
description:
NOT MY ART! I'm pretty sure the artist is Bengus Capcom Correct me if I'm wrong!!!

What's it like when every hero in the whole Multiverse of DC and MCU have to sit through on long meeting??

X-Men, fantastic four, Avengers, Justice League, young justice, Spider Society, Anti heroes, etc

Not my art the water mark is so small I can't tell who the artist is but if anyone knows please let me know so I can give them credit
creator: L's_Once
